basics.name: Junteng Liu
basics.summary: First-year Ph.D. candidate at the HKUST NLP Group, Hong Kong University of Science and Technology. Research focuses on natural language processing and machine learning, with interests in LLM reasoning and reinforcement learning, hallucination in vision-language models (VLM), and LLM truthfulness and interpretability.

work.summary: Research focus on natural language processing and machine learning.
